base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of statues_chozo_pedestals — a tile from 1986 metroid. Chozo statues — bird-warrior pedestals holding powerups in hands. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chozo statues — bird-warrior pedestals holding powerups in hands; 2 palette variants (Brinstar-blue/Norfair-red)
